name: soliton
description: Intelligent multi-agent PR review with adaptive risk-based dispatch

skills.name: pr-review
skills.description: Run an intelligent, risk-adaptive PR review with parallel multi-agent analysis

agents.name: risk-scorer
agents.description: Computes a 0-100 risk score for a PR based on weighted factors

agents.name: correctness
agents.description: Catches logic errors, off-by-one bugs, null handling, and race conditions

agents.name: security
agents.description: Detects OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities via data flow analysis

agents.name: hallucination
agents.description: Detects AI-generated code issues like non-existent APIs and wrong signatures

agents.name: test-quality
agents.description: Evaluates test coverage and test quality for changed code

agents.name: consistency
agents.description: Checks changed code against project conventions and coding standards

agents.name: cross-file-impact
agents.description: Detects when changes break callers, interfaces, or type contracts

agents.name: historical-context
agents.description: Uses git history to identify high-risk patterns in changed files

agents.name: synthesizer
agents.description: Merges, deduplicates, and filters all agent findings into a coherent review
